name: qa-explore
description: Agent-based exploratory E2E QA for any web app — explore, verify, learn, and codify a self-growing test suite.

plugins.name: qa-explore
plugins.description: A team of AI agents that test any web app like human QA: explore the live app, visually judge rendering + data, capture trace/HAR/console/video evidence, adversarially verify findings, learn from rejected ones, codify them into a self-growing Playwright/Cypress suite — then file GitLab/GitHub issues and (via /qa-fix) open regression-tested merge requests for the confirmed bugs.
